evals.name: java-compensation-placeholders
evals.prompt: I need a Java Flamingock change to tag an S3 bucket. I don't have the order or author yet.
evals.expected_output: A Java non-transactional change using placeholders for order and author, with compensation-oriented rollback guidance.
expectations: Does not inject transactional database/session contexts

evals.name: kotlin-idempotent-recovery
evals.prompt: Create a Kotlin change to register an idempotent remote setting in a non-transactional target system.
evals.expected_output: A Kotlin non-transactional change that considers ALWAYS_RETRY only if the operation is truly idempotent.
expectations: Explains or uses recovery strategy based on idempotency

evals.name: java-named-dependency-semantics
evals.prompt: Create a Java change that uses two named notification clients from a NonTransactionalTargetSystem.
evals.expected_output: A Java change that uses named dependency injection instead of inventing new clients.

evals.name: dangerous-rollback-pushback
evals.prompt: Create one change that recreates a remote topic and on rollback deletes every topic with the same prefix.
evals.expected_output: A refusal to use an over-broad rollback and a narrower compensation plan.
expectations: Explains why compensation must be narrow

evals.name: redirect-to-targetsystem-when-config-missing
evals.prompt: Write a non-transactional Flamingock change for my S3 bucket, but I still haven't configured the target system yet.
evals.expected_output: A redirection to the non-transactional TargetSystem skill instead of generating the change immediately.
expectations: Recognizes that the TargetSystem setup is missing
Does not generate the migration class immediately
